title: Premium Beverage Labeling
description: Implemented high-speed shrink sleeve application for new product line, achieving 30% faster production rates while maintaining zero-defect quality standards.

title: Pharmaceutical Compliance
description: Developed tamper-evident smart labels with serialization for pharmaceutical products, ensuring complete regulatory compliance and supply chain visibility.

title: Sustainable Dairy Packaging
description: Transitioned to linerless labels for dairy products, reducing packaging waste by 40% while improving operational efficiency and sustainability metrics.
